title: PATIKIL Green Cardboard Suggestion Box, 2 Pcs 6"x6"x6" Ballot Box with Removable Header Board for Suggestion, Collection, Tip, Donate, Voting
features: Color: Green Material: Corrugated paper Size: 15.2 x 15.2 x 15.2cm/6 x 6 x 6inch (L * W * H) Packing List: 2 Pcs of Raffle Box

Advantage: 1. Made of corrugated paper with good thickness, which is three-dimensional, lightweight, and not easy to deform. It also comes with a removable header board that can write the title on it. 2. The cardboard box is easy to fold without using glue or tape, saving your time.

Instruction: 1. Flatten the "concave" long side at the bottom of the box 2. Flatten the two shorter sides of the bottom of the box to the middle and connect with other interfaces 3. Straighten the box, close the lid, and finally insert the title card

The raffle box can be used as a voting box, fundraiser box, suggestion box, and more, which has many functions like voting, suggestion collection, tip, and donation. Can be widely used in fundraiser, charity events, trade shows, parties, voting places, competitions, etc.
NOTE: Please check the size before purchasing. The Suggestion Box's size is 5.98 x 5.98 x 5.98 inches (L * W * H).
